definition: Premium/Discount Arrays — the collective term for all institutional entry/exit zones (OBs, FVGs, breakers, etc.).
feeds_into: optimal_trade_entry (OTE is applied within PD arrays)
trade entry (PD arrays ARE the entry zones)
related_to: All layer 4 concepts — PD arrays is the UMBRELLA term
stacking: When multiple PD arrays overlap at same price = 'stack' = highest-probability entry. OB + FVG + OTE at same level = Grade A setup. This is the convergence of order_blocks + fair_value_gaps + optimal_trade_entry.
